requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Suppression System Requirements — IEC 62619 and Gambia Building Code / PURA Safety Submission
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防抑制系统要求——IEC 62619及冈比亚建筑规范/PURA安全提交
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防抑制系統要求——IEC 62619及甘比亞建築規範/PURA安全提交

summary.en: Gambia does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS fire-safety installation standard equivalent to NFPA 855 (USA) or EN 50604 (EU). Fire safety for large installations in Gambia falls under the Gambia Fire and Rescue Service (GFRS), which operates under the Ministry of Interior, and general building code compliance administered at local government level. There is no confirmed publicly accessible GFRS technical standard specifically for stationary BESS fire-safety installation as of the dataset date. For donor-funded BESS projects (ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, Jambur 23 MW solar context), the project owner's technical specification typically mandates IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) as the cell and module safety baseline and IEC 62933-5-1 for system-level hazard assessment. PURA's BESS operating-licence safety submission requirements had not been confirmed from publicly accessible PURA guidance as of the dataset date. All containerised or building-integrated BESS installations should include automatic fire detection, gas (H2 / CO / VOC) detection, thermal runaway early warning, and suppression system design documented to IEC 62619 Annex requirements, as this is the internationally expected baseline for project-owner and lender technical due diligence.
summary.zh: 冈比亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS消防安全安装标准，等同于美国NFPA 855或欧盟EN 50604。冈比亚大型装置的消防安全由隶属内政部的冈比亚消防救援局（GFRS）负责，并在地方政府层面执行一般建筑规范合规。截至本数据集日期，尚无经确认且可公开获取的GFRS专门针对固定式BESS消防安全安装的技术标准。对于捐助方资助的BESS项目（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界银行、Jambur 23 MW光伏项目背景），项目业主技术规格通常要求以IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为电芯和模组安全基准，以IEC 62933-5-1进行系统级危害评估。截至本数据集日期，PURA BESS运营许可证安全提交要求尚未从PURA公开指南得到确认。所有集装箱式或建筑集成式BESS装置均应包含自动火灾探测、气体（H2/CO/VOC）探测、热失控早期预警及符合IEC 62619附件要求记录的抑制系统设计，因为这是项目业主和贷款方技术尽职调查的国际预期基准。
summary.zht: 甘比亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS消防安全安裝標準，等同於美國NFPA 855或歐盟EN 50604。甘比亞大型裝置的消防安全由隸屬內政部的甘比亞消防救援局（GFRS）負責，並在地方政府層面執行一般建築規範合規。截至本數據集日期，尚無經確認且可公開獲取的GFRS專門針對固定式BESS消防安全安裝的技術標準。對於捐助方資助的BESS項目（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界銀行、Jambur 23 MW光伏項目背景），項目業主技術規格通常要求以IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為電芯和模組安全基準，以IEC 62933-5-1進行系統級危害評估。截至本數據集日期，PURA BESS運營許可證安全提交要求尚未從PURA公開指南得到確認。所有集裝箱式或建築集成式BESS裝置均應包含自動火災探測、氣體（H2/CO/VOC）探測、熱失控早期預警及符合IEC 62619附件要求記錄的抑制系統設計，因為這是項目業主和貸款方技術盡職調查的國際預期基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS fire and safety in Gambia donor-project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level fire safety standard expected in donor-project specifications)

Gambia Fire and Rescue Service (GFRS) — authority having jurisdiction for fire safety in Gambia; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific fire-safety standard as of dataset date — verify directly with GFRS
PURA (Public Utilities Regulatory Authority) — BESS operating-licence safety submission requirements unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with PURA

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules including thermal runaway propagation mitigation requirements. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Gambia's GFRS, PURA, or donor-project specifications as equivalent to IEC 62619. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62619-aligned test reports and system safety documentation for Gambia project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求）管理BESS消防安全，该标准包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定，含热失控蔓延缓解要求。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被冈比亚GFRS、PURA或捐助方项目规格认可为IEC 62619的等效依据。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在冈比亚项目审查中补充IEC 62619对齐的测试报告和系统安全文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求）管理BESS消防安全，該標準包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定，含熱失控蔓延緩解要求。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被甘比亞GFRS、PURA或捐助方項目規格認可為IEC 62619的等效依據。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在甘比亞項目審查中補充IEC 62619對齊的測試報告和系統安全文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed publicly accessible BESS-specific fire-safety installation standard exists in Gambia as of the dataset date. Despite the regulatory gap, IEC 62619 cell and module safety test evidence and IEC 62933-5-1 system hazard assessment documentation are the internationally expected baseline for donor-funded BESS project acceptance and PURA licence safety submission. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards alone does not satisfy these requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with GFRS whether a specific fire-safety installation standard applies to containerised or building-integrated BESS in Gambia; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) prepare system-level fire-safety documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-1 hazard identification and risk mitigation requirements; (d) design fire suppression, gas detection, and thermal runaway early warning systems to the IEC 62619 and donor-project specification requirements; (e) ensure all fire-safety equipment meets the specifications of the applicable donor agency.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，冈比亚尚无经确认的、可公开获取的专门针对BESS消防安全安装的标准。尽管存在监管差距，IEC 62619电芯和模组安全测试证据及IEC 62933-5-1系统危害评估文件仍是捐助方资助BESS项目验收和PURA许可证安全提交的国际预期基准。仅凭中国GB标准的BESS消防安全文件不满足上述要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向GFRS确认冈比亚集装箱式或建筑集成式BESS是否适用特定消防安全安装标准；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）准备符合IEC 62933-5-1危害识别和风险缓解要求的系统级消防安全文件；（d）按IEC 62619和捐助方项目规格要求设计消防抑制、气体探测和热失控早期预警系统；（e）确保所有消防安全设备符合相关捐助方机构的规格。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，甘比亞尚無經確認的、可公開獲取的專門針對BESS消防安全安裝的標準。儘管存在監管差距，IEC 62619電芯和模組安全測試證據及IEC 62933-5-1系統危害評估文件仍是捐助方資助BESS項目驗收和PURA許可證安全提交的國際預期基準。僅憑中國GB標準的BESS消防安全文件不滿足上述要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向GFRS確認甘比亞集裝箱式或建築集成式BESS是否適用特定消防安全安裝標準；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）準備符合IEC 62933-5-1危害識別和風險緩解要求的系統級消防安全文件；（d）按IEC 62619和捐助方項目規格要求設計消防抑制、氣體探測和熱失控早期預警系統；（e）確保所有消防安全設備符合相關捐助方機構的規格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor-funded projects where project specifications require IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-1 fire-safety evidence; GFRS mandatory fire-safety installation standard for BESS not confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with GFRS and PURA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS fire-safety installation standard has been identified for Gambia as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619 cell and module safety test evidence and IEC 62933-5-1 system hazard documentation are the expected baseline for donor-funded BESS project acceptance and PURA safety submission. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation alone is not sufficient. Verify with GFRS and PURA; prepare IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-1 documentation; design fire suppression and gas detection systems to the requirements of the project owner's specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，冈比亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS消防安全安装标准。然而，IEC 62619电芯和模组安全测试证据及IEC 62933-5-1系统危害文件是捐助方资助BESS项目验收和PURA安全提交的预期基准。仅凭中国GB标准消防安全文件不足够。请向GFRS和PURA核实；准备IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-1文件；按项目业主规格要求设计消防抑制和气体探测系统。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，甘比亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS消防安全安裝標準。然而，IEC 62619電芯和模組安全測試證據及IEC 62933-5-1系統危害文件是捐助方資助BESS項目驗收和PURA安全提交的預期基準。僅憑中國GB標準消防安全文件不足夠。請向GFRS和PURA核實；準備IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-1文件；按項目業主規格要求設計消防抑制和氣體探測系統。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal Runaway Detection and Containment — Gambia Tropical Climate Considerations
requirement_topic.zh: 热失控探测与防护——冈比亚热带气候因素
requirement_topic.zht: 熱失控探測與防護——甘比亞熱帶氣候因素

summary.en: Gambia has a hot and semi-arid tropical climate (Köppen BSh/BWh in the interior, tropical wet-dry on the coast), with daily ambient temperatures regularly exceeding 35°C from March to June and high humidity during the rainy season (June–October). These conditions directly affect BESS lithium-ion cell electrochemical performance, accelerate capacity fade, and increase the risk of thermal runaway if battery management system (BMS) temperature thresholds are not reconfigured for the ambient temperature range. Containerised BESS systems rated to IEC 62619 at 25°C ambient will require thermal management system (TMS) capacity reassessment and derating for Gambia's operating temperature range. Active cooling capacity must be sized for peak Gambia ambient conditions (typically 35–40°C dry-bulb in peak season). In addition, high humidity (relative humidity >85% in rainy season) and dust ingress (harmattan dust during November–March) require BESS enclosures with minimum IP54 rating (preferably IP65) to prevent insulation degradation and short-circuit risk. These are not unique Gambia regulatory requirements, but reflect the internationally expected engineering practice for BESS deployed in tropical West Africa.
summary.zh: 冈比亚气候为炎热半干旱热带气候（内陆为柯本BSh/BWh，沿海为热带湿干季气候），3月至6月日间环境温度常超过35°C，雨季（6月至10月）湿度高。这些条件直接影响BESS锂离子电芯电化学性能，加速容量衰减，若电池管理系统（BMS）温度阈值未针对环境温度范围重新配置，则增加热失控风险。按IEC 62619在25°C环境温度下额定的集装箱式BESS系统，须重新评估热管理系统（TMS）容量并针对冈比亚运行温度范围进行降额。主动冷却容量须按冈比亚峰值环境条件（旺季通常为35–40°C干球温度）进行设计。此外，高湿度（雨季相对湿度>85%）和粉尘侵入（11月至3月哈马丹粉尘）要求BESS机壳防护等级最低达到IP54（优选IP65），以防止绝缘退化和短路风险。这些并非冈比亚独特的监管要求，而是热带西非BESS部署的国际预期工程实践。
summary.zht: 甘比亞氣候為炎熱半乾旱熱帶氣候（內陸為柯本BSh/BWh，沿海為熱帶濕乾季氣候），3月至6月日間環境溫度常超過35°C，雨季（6月至10月）濕度高。這些條件直接影響BESS鋰離子電芯電化學性能，加速容量衰減，若電池管理系統（BMS）溫度閾值未針對環境溫度範圍重新配置，則增加熱失控風險。按IEC 62619在25°C環境溫度下額定的集裝箱式BESS系統，須重新評估熱管理系統（TMS）容量並針對甘比亞運行溫度範圍進行降額。主動冷卻容量須按甘比亞峰值環境條件（旺季通常為35–40°C干球溫度）進行設計。此外，高濕度（雨季相對濕度>85%）和粉塵侵入（11月至3月哈馬丹粉塵）要求BESS機殼防護等級最低達到IP54（優選IP65），以防止絕緣退化和短路風險。這些並非甘比亞獨特的監管要求，而是熱帶西非BESS部署的國際預期工程實踐。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (thermal runaway prevention and propagation requirements; Section 6.4 abuse tolerance tests)
IEC 62933-5-2:2020 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (environmental safety requirements including temperature and humidity operating range)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum, IP65 preferred for Gambia tropical/harmattan dust conditions
IEC 62619:2022 Annex A — Guidance on thermal management for battery systems in elevated ambient temperature environments

summary.en: Chinese BESS thermal management design is governed by GB 44240-2024 (which includes thermal runaway propagation mitigation requirements) and GB/T 36276-2023. Chinese BESS systems are typically validated at 25°C ambient and may have thermal management systems sized for temperate Chinese grid conditions. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Gambia must reassess TMS capacity for Gambia's peak ambient temperature range (35–40°C), reconfigure BMS temperature protection thresholds, and verify that enclosure IP ratings are adequate for high humidity and harmattan dust conditions. The Chinese standard IEC/IP enclosure rating requirement (typically GB/T 4208 equivalent to IEC 60529) is technically consistent with the approach required for Gambia, but the specific temperature derating documentation for Gambia conditions must be separately prepared.
summary.zh: 中国BESS热管理设计由GB 44240-2024（含热失控蔓延缓解要求）和GB/T 36276-2023管控。中国BESS系统通常在25°C环境温度下完成验证，热管理系统可能按温带中国电网条件进行设计。向冈比亚出口的中国制造商须重新评估TMS容量以适应冈比亚峰值环境温度范围（35–40°C），重新配置BMS温度保护阈值，并验证机壳IP防护等级是否足以应对高湿度和哈马丹粉尘条件。中国标准IEC/IP机壳防护等级要求（通常为GB/T 4208，等效IEC 60529）在技术方法上与冈比亚要求一致，但须单独准备针对冈比亚条件的具体温度降额文件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS熱管理設計由GB 44240-2024（含熱失控蔓延緩解要求）和GB/T 36276-2023管控。中國BESS系統通常在25°C環境溫度下完成驗證，熱管理系統可能按溫帶中國電網條件進行設計。向甘比亞出口的中國製造商須重新評估TMS容量以適應甘比亞峰值環境溫度範圍（35–40°C），重新配置BMS溫度保護閾值，並驗證機殼IP防護等級是否足以應對高濕度和哈馬丹粉塵條件。中國標準IEC/IP機殼防護等級要求（通常為GB/T 4208，等效IEC 60529）在技術方法上與甘比亞要求一致，但須單獨準備針對甘比亞條件的具體溫度降額文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (thermal runaway propagation mitigation; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 4208-2017 — 外壳防护等级（IP代码）(Enclosure Protection Rating — IP Code; equivalent to IEC 60529)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese BESS systems are typically designed and validated for temperate operating conditions (25°C ambient baseline). Gambia's tropical climate — peak ambient 35–40°C, high humidity in rainy season, harmattan dust November–March — requires: (a) TMS capacity reassessment and derating documentation for Gambia's peak ambient conditions; (b) BMS temperature protection threshold reconfiguration for higher ambient baseline; (c) IP54 minimum (IP65 preferred) enclosure rating to protect against humidity and dust ingress; (d) extended thermal runaway risk assessment for elevated ambient temperature operation, as IEC 62619 standard test conditions (25°C) may not represent worst-case Gambia operating temperatures; (e) cooling system reliability assessment for high ambient conditions including HVAC redundancy for containerised BESS. These derating and climate adaptation requirements are design engineering requirements that must be addressed before equipment procurement is finalised for Gambia projects.
gap.zh: 差距：中国BESS系统通常针对温带运行条件（25°C环境温度基准）进行设计和验证。冈比亚热带气候——峰值环境35–40°C、雨季高湿度、11月至3月哈马丹粉尘——要求：（a）针对冈比亚峰值环境条件重新评估TMS容量并出具降额文件；（b）针对较高环境基准温度重新配置BMS温度保护阈值；（c）机壳防护等级最低IP54（优选IP65），以防止湿气和粉尘侵入；（d）针对高环境温度运行的扩展热失控风险评估，因为IEC 62619标准测试条件（25°C）可能无法代表冈比亚最不利运行温度；（e）针对高环境条件（包括集装箱BESS的暖通空调冗余）进行冷却系统可靠性评估。上述降额和气候适应要求是设计工程要求，须在冈比亚项目设备采购最终确定前予以解决。
gap.zht: 差距：中國BESS系統通常針對溫帶運行條件（25°C環境溫度基準）進行設計和驗證。甘比亞熱帶氣候——峰值環境35–40°C、雨季高濕度、11月至3月哈馬丹粉塵——要求：（a）針對甘比亞峰值環境條件重新評估TMS容量並出具降額文件；（b）針對較高環境基準溫度重新配置BMS溫度保護閾值；（c）機殼防護等級最低IP54（優選IP65），以防止濕氣和粉塵侵入；（d）針對高環境溫度運行的擴展熱失控風險評估，因為IEC 62619標準測試條件（25°C）可能無法代表甘比亞最不利運行溫度；（e）針對高環境條件（包括集裝箱BESS的暖通空調冗余）進行冷卻系統可靠性評估。上述降額和氣候適應要求是設計工程要求，須在甘比亞項目設備採購最終確定前予以解決。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in engineering practice — IEC 62619 thermal runaway and climate derating requirements are expected by donor-project specifications and lender due diligence; not yet confirmed as a standalone Gambia regulatory requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese market under GB 44240-2024; climate derating for Gambia conditions is an additional engineering requirement not addressed by Chinese domestic standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gambia's hot-humid tropical climate (peak ambient 35–40°C, high humidity in rainy season, harmattan dust) requires thermal management system derating, BMS threshold reconfiguration, and IP54+ enclosure rating beyond what standard Chinese BESS systems are validated for at 25°C. These are engineering requirements driven by IEC 62619 and donor-project specifications, not confirmed Gambia regulatory mandates. Address TMS capacity, BMS settings, and enclosure IP rating before finalising equipment for Gambia deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 冈比亚炎热潮湿的热带气候（峰值环境35–40°C、雨季高湿度、哈马丹粉尘）要求在标准中国BESS系统按25°C验证基础上，进行热管理系统降额、BMS阈值重新配置和IP54+机壳防护等级提升。这些是由IEC 62619和捐助方项目规格驱动的工程要求，而非经确认的冈比亚监管强制要求。在最终确定冈比亚部署设备前，须解决TMS容量、BMS设置和机壳IP防护等级问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 甘比亞炎熱潮濕的熱帶氣候（峰值環境35–40°C、雨季高濕度、哈馬丹粉塵）要求在標準中國BESS系統按25°C驗證基礎上，進行熱管理系統降額、BMS閾值重新配置和IP54+機殼防護等級提升。這些是由IEC 62619和捐助方項目規格驅動的工程要求，而非經確認的甘比亞監管強制要求。在最終確定甘比亞部署設備前，須解決TMS容量、BMS設置和機殼IP防護等級問題。
